title: Nocturnia
description: A simple horror mod that adds a creepy entity watching the player.
body:
You are never truly alone...

This horror mod brings psychological tension and constant fear into Minecraft. A mysterious entity is watching you. It lurks in the shadows, follows your movements, and waits for the perfect moment to strike — often with a brutal jumpscare.
![...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7013589155330fb36d5fda57ad9ba75992b2dd0_0.webp)

Designed to create anxiety and paranoia, this mod turns even the safest-looking place into a 
nightmare. You’ll hear whispers, footsteps behind you, and sometimes… nothing at all — until it’s too late.

Whether you're playing solo or recording content, this mod adds raw, terrifying moments that keep you on edge. Perfect for horror lovers and content creators looking to scare their audience.

Created by During Community — known for immersive and polished Minecraft experiences.
